sourcesContent:
import banner1 from '../assets/images/banner1.jpg';
import banner2 from '../assets/images/banner2.jpg';
import banner3 from '../assets/images/banner3.jpg';

import bannerMo1 from '../assets/images/banner_mo1.jpg';
import bannerMo2 from '../assets/images/banner_mo2.jpg';
import bannerMo3 from '../assets/images/banner_mo3.jpg';

import women1 from '../assets/images/18.jpg';
import women2 from '../assets/images/8-2.jpg';
import women3 from '../assets/images/9.jpg';

import men1 from '../assets/images/11.jpg';
import men2 from '../assets/images/10.jpg';
import men3 from '../assets/images/12.jpg';

import eyewear1 from '../assets/images/19.jpg';
import eyewear2 from '../assets/images/20.jpg';
import eyewear3 from '../assets/images/21.jpg';

// ─── 배너 데이터 ───
export const banners = [
  {
    id: 'women',
    title: 'Spring Summer Womenswear Collection',
    theme: 'light',
    bg: '#c8c5bc',
    img: banner1,
    mobileImg: bannerMo1,
    viewStyle: 'box',
    viewLink: '/collection/women',
  },
  {
    id: 'men',
    title: 'Spring Summer Menswear Collection',
    theme: 'light',
    bg: '#2e2c2a',
    img: banner2,
    mobileImg: bannerMo2,
    viewStyle: 'box',
    viewLink: '/collection/men',
  },
  {
    id: 'collab',
    year: 'Collaboration',
    title: 'EFFECTOR × RECTO',
    theme: 'light',
    bg: '#e8e6e0',
    img: banner3,
    mobileImg: bannerMo3,
    viewStyle: 'box',
    viewLink: '#!',
    externalLink: true,
  },
];

// ─── 여성 상품 카테고리 ───
export const womenCategories = [
  { id: 161, name: 'OUTERWEAR' },
  { id: 288, name: 'JACKETS' },
  { id: 162, name: 'TOPS & T-SHIRTS' },
  { id: 223, name: 'SHIRTS & BLOUSES' },
  { id: 248, name: 'KNITWEAR' },
  { id: 165, name: 'DRESSES' },
  { id: 163, name: 'SKIRTS' },
  { id: 164, name: 'PANTS' },
];

// ─── 여성 상품 데이터 ───
export const womenProducts = [
  // ── 홈 THE EDIT 대표 상품 (로컬 이미지 보유) ──
  {
    id: 7179,
    name: 'SINGULAR TOTE MINI',
    color: 'BLACK',

    price: 325000,
    currency: 'KRW',
    category: 'bags',
    bg: '#d0cec8',

    sizes: [{ size: 'OS', height: 21.0, width: 14.5, depth: 9.0, handleDrop: 8.5 }],

  // ── OUTERWEAR (cate_no=161) ──

  { id: 6942, name: 'OVERSIZED CAPE JUMPER', color: 'LIGHT KHAKI', price: 595000, currency: 'KRW', category: 'outerwear', imageUrl: 'https://recto.co/web/product/medium/202603/f475aacb62165016b0cb439e53f0921d.jpg' },
  { id: 6938, name: 'MUFFLER WRAP COAT', color: 'YELLOW BEIGE', price: 495000, currency: 'KRW', category: 'outerwear', imageUrl: 'https://recto.co/web/product/medium/202603/8906d92666f0786458400f1af72ab8b4.jpg' },
  { id: 6940, name: 'DETACHABLE PAD HUNTING COAT', color: 'ECRU', price: 495000, currency: 'KRW', category: 'outerwear', imageUrl: 'https://recto.co/web/product/medium/202603/a10c9311b5e0b7e667643da91644602d.jpg' },
  { id: 6939, name: 'MUFFLER WRAP COAT', color: 'SEPIA GREY', price: 495000, currency: 'KRW', category: 'outerwear', imageUrl: 'https://recto.co/web/product/medium/202603/9345a258ec47590f119a7f06697f824c.jpg' },
  { id: 6943, name: 'OVERSIZED CAPE JUMPER', color: 'BLACK', price: 595000, currency: 'KRW', category: 'outerwear', imageUrl: 'https://recto.co/web/product/medium/202603/14b20fbceae0013cc7b3e0b7111545b7.jpg' },

  { id: 6932, name: 'COLLAR DETAIL FLUID SUIT JACKET', color: 'DARK NAVY', price: 655000, currency: 'KRW', category: 'jackets', imageUrl: 'https://recto.co/web/product/medium/202603/ff1741afa55fa4fbab8fcfe97be6ec80.jpg' },

// ─── 남성 상품 데이터 ───
export const menProducts = [
  {
    id: 7203,
    name: 'SINGULAR CROSS STRAP BAG',
    color: 'CINDER',
    code: 'RW26SABG002TP',
    price: 465000,
    currency: 'KRW',
    bg: '#d0cec8',
    imageUrl: men1,
    description:
      'Slim strap connection with full-grain leather construction. Naturally folding sides and bottom, inner streamlined base, hand-stitched top sealing, 2-way slider mechanism. Functions as both crossbody bag and clutch via adjustable strap.',
    material: {
      main: '100% Cow Leather',
      lining: '100% Cotton',
    },
    sizes: [
      { size: 'OS', height: 32.0, width: 19.5, depth: 12.0, handleDrop: 50.0 },

      'Gently wipe soiled areas with a soft cloth',
    ],

  {
    id: 7079,

    color: 'DARK NAVY',

    price: 595000,
    currency: 'KRW',
    bg: '#e8e5de',
    imageUrl: men2,
    description:
      'Short-length double-breasted blazer featuring notched lapels, back vents, and hem binding. Includes internal lining with lightweight plain-weave wool fabric.',

      main: '100% Wool',

    },
    sizes: [

      'Avoid bleach or fluorescent agents',
      'Exercise caution against color bleeding and discoloration',

  {
    id: 7229,
